hero.tagline: Designing digital transformation and implementing best-in-breed technologies

intro.title: Game Changing Approach
intro.body: Startin Strategy combines more than 15 years of transformation experience with industry knowledge, technology awareness, and a strong focus on corporate culture. Its services span digital maturity assessment, strategy development, technology selection, transformation governance, managed services, cloud solutions, and custom software development. Working across established enterprise platforms and emerging technologies, Startin helps organizations align business models, processes, people, and technology around practical transformation priorities. By combining world-class methods with sector-specific understanding, the company enables businesses to move beyond adapting to change and build the capabilities required to lead it.

cards.title: Cloud Services
cards.description: Supports the adoption and use of cloud technologies to improve scalability, flexibility, accessibility, and digital service delivery.

cards.title: Digital Maturity Assessment
cards.description: Assesses current digital capabilities through the TÜBİTAK DDX Maturity Model and identifies priority areas for transformation.

cards.title: Digital Strategy Development
cards.description: Builds practical digital strategies that align technology investments, business objectives, operating models, and future growth priorities.

cards.title: Technology Awareness
cards.description: Introduces relevant established and emerging technologies, helping organizations understand their applications, value, and business implications.

cards.title: Corporate Transformation
cards.description: Coordinates transformation across people, processes, business models, technology, and corporate culture to support sustainable organizational change.

cards.title: Technology Selection
cards.description: Evaluates technology alternatives and positions suitable enterprise solutions according to business requirements, readiness, and transformation objectives.

cards.title: Transformation Governance
cards.description: Structures the governance required to coordinate transformation initiatives, responsibilities, priorities, and implementation activities across the organization.

cards.title: Managed Services
cards.description: Provides ongoing operational and technical support for enterprise platforms, digital systems, and continuously evolving business requirements.
